title: auganthus latisectus
intro: Auganthus latisectus, also known as the narrowleaf desert-marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Auganthus latisectus include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Auganthus latisectus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to promote skin health and soothe irritated skin.
